description: Render a labeled QA contact-sheet PNG from a Codex pet atlas: every cell scaled onto a checkerboard with row labels, frame counts, and used/unused outlines.
rules: local-only — reads the atlas, writes a contact-sheet image
default scale 0.5; override with SCALE (float as string)
contact sheet written to record_store as contact-sheet.png
usage: Set ATLAS (path to the atlas PNG/WebP); optionally SCALE. Output: contact-sheet.png.
limitation: Visualization only; does not validate or modify the atlas. Requires Pillow (PIL); without it the porter writes a placeholder file.
